title: Zesty Media Group
description: A Zesty.io media group is a folder within a media bin used to organize media files hierarchically.

ZUID.description: The Zesty Universal Identifier for the group.

name.description: The name of the media group.

binZUID.description: The bin ZUID this group belongs to.

groupZUID.description: The parent group ZUID if nested.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the group was last updated.
